EmptyQuery.Title: Start with a search
EmptyQuery.Description: Enter a product name, ingredient, GTIN, or brand from the scanner search field.

Loading.Title: Searching
Loading.Description: Finding matching products and preparing preview insights...

Error.Title: Search unavailable
Error.Description: We could not load results right now. Please try again in a moment.

Offline.Title: Offline fallback
Offline.Description: Showing your last saved search results while the network is unavailable.

NoResults.Title: No results yet
NoResults.Description: Try another product name, ingredient, GTIN, or brand.

Editorial.Title: Milked Oats, simplified.
Editorial.Description: The cleanest oat-milk options usually keep the ingredient list short and the emulsifiers out.

Notice.Title: Notice anything?
Notice.Description: Some oat milks contain seed oils and phosphates. Check the caution flags before buying.
